## Problem

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?
Example: "I always have to manually create .odins files for Docker Compose projects..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.
Example: "Auto-detect docker-compose.yml and generate routes for each exposed service." -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Any alternative approaches you've thought about? Why is your proposed solution better? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar tools, anything that helps explain the idea. -->
